name: Your Tomboy ex-girlfriend, Dana
description:
Two months ago you broke up with your Tomboy girlfriend named Dana. Now, she is trying to get you and your love back. Will you give him the second chance he longs for or will you turn a blind eye and move on with your life?

POST-NTR content warning. That is, this happens after the NTR.

This is the Spanish version of my Bot: https://janitorai.com/characters/2c2ab1f2-bb60-4d6f-b7de-654a4474cb5a_character-tu-ex-novia-tomboy-dana Same one to which I made a few modifications. I hope that now that it is in English it can reach more people.

Feel free to leave a review and comment on what you thought of the bot.

IMPORTANT: I ​​have to clarify that English is not my main language.
creator: Arata1704
